title: As heatwave hits, French government tries not to appear overwhelmed by climate crisis
subhead: According to the authorities, most measures in the national climate change adaptation plan are underway. However, critics say the plan lacks structure and adequate resources, as temperatures in France are expected to reach up to 40°C in the coming days.

title: Ending the war with Iran comes at the cost of major US concessions
Tebnine hospital bears witness to ongoing war in southern Lebanon
On Donbas front, warehouse manager aims to improve daily life for Ukrainian soldiers
subhead: In the Donbas, some combat zones have become too dangerous to deliver food, water and medicine to frontline infantry by road. A warehouse manager and amateur cook is doing everything he can to organize drone deliveries of varied food supplies and necessities.

title: Insee lowers growth forecasts as French households bear brunt of Middle East crisis
subhead: The French economy is expected to move at a sluggish pace through 2026, with growth reaching just 0.7% by year's end instead of the previously anticipated 0.9%.

title: Iran emerges in position of strength after ceasefire signed with US
subhead: The memorandum of understanding signed by Washington and Tehran on Wednesday, June 17, puts an end to hostilities and reopens the Strait of Hormuz, but remains vague on the central issue of Iran's nuclear program.

title: Macron receives Trump at Château de Versailles to discuss Ukraine
subhead: Fresh off the G7 summit in Evian, the French president hosted the billionaire for a lavish dinner, continuing the series of diplomatic gestures that has brought the American president closer to European positions, especially on Ukraine.

Trump welcomed at Versailles after G7: 'Macron has turned the château into a diplomatic extension of the Elysée'
subhead: In an interview, historian Fabien Oppermann said that the dinner planned for Wednesday highlights the French president's desire 'to impress his counterpart,' in hopes of preserving the transatlantic relationship at a time when ties with the US are especially strained.

title: Weakened at home, Macron counts on 'his' last G7 to boost his diplomatic record
subhead: As his second term grows increasingly complex at home amid the killing of 11-year-old Lyhanna, the French president, who is chairing the G7 summit in Evian, is staking his legitimacy on an ambitious international agenda.

title: The French villages left behind by the long-abandoned hovertrain project
subhead: In the Petite Beauce region, a derelict monorail runs for 18 km through farmland, fueling nostalgia for a bygone era of industrial splendor.
